message:
feat(mux,codec): add floating pane wire protocol PDUs and tests [ft-2dd4s.2]

Add wire protocol PDU types for floating pane operations in the codec
crate: CreateFloatingPane (63), MoveFloatingPane (64), SetFloatingPaneZ
(65), ToggleFloatingPane (66), RemoveFloatingPane (67).

Add comprehensive tests in mux for floating pane edge cases:
- z-order determinism after bring-to-front operations
- reposition geometry updates
- resize clamping to tab bounds
- remove non-existent pane returns None
- proptest: z-order uniqueness after arbitrary focus operations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
